title: Translation and Interpretation Services

sources.title: 2022 SUSB Annual Data Tables by Establishment Industry
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen target-band count used only in the target-archetype coverage calculation.

sources.title: NAICS 541930 Translation and Interpretation Services definition
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen scope definition for the selected translation/localization-led target archetype.

sources.title: NAPCS Product List for NAICS 54193
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen product-scope context for the selected target archetype.

sources.title: The 2024 Nimdzi 100
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen observed provider cohort used only in the selected-archetype enumeration.

sources.title: Review of the ALC 2015 Industry Survey
sources.what_it_supports: Frozen context that both written translation and interpreting are material, without supplying target cash-cost or outcome primitives.

narrative.executive_view: This packet is limited to the frozen translation/localization-led target archetype. Selection uncertainty and a MISSING value basis prevent an economic conclusion or any industry-wide claim.
narrative.revenue_and_pass_through: No target-band accrual recognized-revenue reconciliation identifies qualifying third-party pass-through. The canonical empty partition is retained, but revenue and controllable value added remain MISSING.
narrative.technical_value: The frozen authorities do not identify employee or controllable-contractor cash costs, role weights, or removable fractions for this archetype. The contaminated broad 5419 occupation mix is not used.
narrative.implementation: No supplied authority establishes a target-specific five-year operational realization schedule or implementation investment schedule. Each implementation primitive remains MISSING rather than receiving a neutral estimate.
narrative.commercial_capture: No target-specific evidence in the frozen authorities separates price, volume, service mix, renewal mechanics, and customer switching. Commercial retention is therefore MISSING in every year.
narrative.buyability: The frozen enumeration supports selected-archetype coverage only. It does not establish sale availability, buyer access/win share, deal execution capacity, or integration onboarding capacity.
narrative.entry_and_exit: No closed target-comparable transaction evidence is supplied for entry multiples or an entry-equivalent downside exit multiple. The canonical year-five operating state and multiple anchor remain MISSING.
narrative.operator_survival: No reconciled fixed-base service basket or target-specific year-five operator-controlled quantity is supplied. Constant-price survival is MISSING and no scalar substitute is introduced.
narrative.risks_and_uncertainty: The translation/localization-led and interpreting-led count ranges overlap. The frozen specification also withholds a value basis, requiring UNPROVEN readiness and leaving affected economic primitives unresolved.

scenario_narratives.low: No low-case economic primitive is authored because the required target-specific denominator, costs, realization, commercial, buyability, valuation, and survival evidence is absent.
scenario_narratives.base: The base case preserves the frozen selected archetype and its coverage calculation, while leaving all unsupported economic primitives MISSING rather than implying a central estimate.
scenario_narratives.high: No high-case economic primitive is authored because uncertainty cannot be converted into an unsupported optimistic range; selection uncertainty remains explicit.

recognized_revenue.rationale: The frozen value basis provides no target-band recognized-revenue amount or reconciliation.
caveats: Gross billings are not substituted for controllable value-added revenue.

evidence.rationale: No qualifying pass-through categories or reconciliation are supplied.
caveats: The empty partition does not establish a revenue denominator.

amount.rationale: The frozen value basis does not identify target-specific employee cash cost.
caveats: Broad-industry payroll share is not a substitute.

amount.rationale: The frozen value basis does not identify controllable contractor cash cost.
caveats: Freelance linguist purchases are not presumed pass-through or quantified here.

r1.rationale: No supported year-one realization primitive is supplied.

r2.rationale: No supported year-two realization primitive is supplied.

r3.rationale: No supported year-three realization primitive is supplied.

r4.rationale: No supported year-four realization primitive is supplied.

r5.rationale: No supported year-five realization primitive is supplied.

k0.rationale: No supported upfront implementation investment is supplied.

k1.rationale: No supported year-one investment is supplied.

k2.rationale: No supported year-two investment is supplied.

k3.rationale: No supported year-three investment is supplied.

k4.rationale: No supported year-four investment is supplied.

k5.rationale: No supported year-five investment is supplied.

c1.rationale: No supported year-one commercial retention primitive is supplied.

c2.rationale: No supported year-two commercial retention primitive is supplied.

c3.rationale: No supported year-three commercial retention primitive is supplied.

c4.rationale: No supported year-four commercial retention primitive is supplied.

c5.rationale: No supported year-five commercial retention primitive is supplied.

target_archetype_coverage.rationale: Frozen selected-archetype counts of 7, 14, and 21 divided by the frozen 28-firm target band yield 0.25, 0.50, and 0.75.
caveats: The provider cohort is incomplete and selection uncertainty remains true.

five_year_sale_availability.rationale: No five-year sale-availability evidence is supplied.

buyer_access_win_share.rationale: No conditional buyer access and win-share evidence is supplied.

deal_execution_capacity_5y.rationale: No deal execution capacity evidence is supplied.

integration_onboarding_capacity_5y.rationale: No integration onboarding capacity evidence is supplied.

buy_multiple.rationale: No entry-equivalent target-comparable buy multiple is supplied.

normalized_y5_operating_state.rationale: No target-comparable evidence supports a canonical entry-equivalent operating state.

anchor.rationale: No entry-equivalent comparable multiple anchor is supplied.

operator_controlled_value_added_demand_s.rationale: No exhaustive fixed-base service reconciliation to controllable value added is supplied.

cross_checks.target_identity_preserved: The packet retains only the frozen translation/localization-led archetype and states its selection uncertainty.
cross_checks.pass_through_removed_once: No pass-through category is authored; the canonical empty GROSS_OF_ALL partition has no duplicated deduction.
cross_checks.removability_only_in_v: No removability primitive is authored outside the unresolved controllable-value-added construct.
cross_checks.investment_only_in_i: No implementation investment is embedded in commercial retention, buyability, valuation, or survival.
cross_checks.commercial_only_in_c: No commercial retention estimate is inserted into implementation, valuation, or survival constructs.
cross_checks.buyer_access_separate_from_price: Sale availability and conditional access/win are separate unresolved primitives, and no price discount is embedded.
cross_checks.p_uses_frozen_y5_state: The missing downside anchor binds the same null canonical-state digest as the missing normalized state.
cross_checks.p_excludes_c_and_survival: The closed downside exclusion map excludes commercial retention and constant-price survival with all other prohibited channels.
cross_checks.survival_is_constant_price_value_added: No survival scalar is used; the missing basket preserves the required constant-price controllable-value-added boundary.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Controllable value-added denominator and cash-cost basis
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents V, I, C, h, and constant-price survival from being identified.

top_uncertain_inputs.input: Operational realization, investment, and commercial retention
top_uncertain_inputs.score_impact: Prevents five-year operating benefit and commercial capture from being identified.
Prevents B and P from being identified despite the frozen archetype coverage calculation.

reviewer_note: Primitive-only packet. Selection uncertainty and the frozen missing value basis require UNPROVEN readiness; no scores, gates, actions, or verdicts are authored.
